case_title: ALLA EDDINE BEDDARBENHAMIMI VS. NATHAN KUDELA ET AL

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL, SHORT CAUSE TRIAL SET FOR DEC-19-2016 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON AUG-24-2016 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-19-2016 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Dec-19-2016 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Department 206 for Short Cause Trial/Prove Up.
Department 514, Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: A. Mok. Proceedings reported by: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

Marc Libarle, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff ALLA EDDINE BEDDARBENHAMIMI, sworn and examined.
No appearance by or on behalf of Defendant NATHAN KUDELA.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1-10 dismissed without prejudice.

Plaintiff's Exhibits:
1-Notice of Time and Place of Trial
2-Note and security agreement
Court returned exhibits to Plaintiff.

After evidence, Court ordered the following Judgment entered in favor of Plaintiff ALLA EDDINE BEDDARBENHAMINI and against Defendant NATHAN KUDELA as follows:
Principal $52,564.00
Pre-Judgment Interest $0
Attorney's Fees $0
Costs $0
Total Judgment in the amount of $52,564.00

Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-10-2016 Set For Trial On Dec-19-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
